task_completion.description: Verify that two new collections named 'dataset-mnist' and 'dataset-imagenet' have been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Zotero application, look at the left sidebar (collections pane) under 'My Library'. There should be two folder icons labeled exactly 'dataset-mnist' and 'dataset-imagenet'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct papers were moved to the 'dataset-mnist' collection.
task_completion.visual_evidence: When the 'dataset-mnist' collection is selected in the left sidebar, the middle pane should list exactly two papers: 'Deep Learning' and 'Generative Adversarial Nets'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct papers were moved to the 'dataset-imagenet' collection.
task_completion.visual_evidence: When the 'dataset-imagenet' collection is selected in the left sidebar, the middle pane should list exactly two papers: 'ImageNet Classification with Deep Convolutional Neural Networks' and 'Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'dataset-mnist' and 'dataset-imagenet' tags have been deleted from the library.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the tag selector pane in the bottom left corner of the Zotero window. The tags 'dataset-mnist' and 'dataset-imagenet' should not be visible in the list of tags.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the Zotero GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Zotero application interface being used, rather than terminal windows executing SQLite commands or scripts to modify the database directly.

integrity.description: Verify that the papers are the original library items and not newly created dummy items.
integrity.visual_evidence: The papers in the collections should appear as standard Zotero items with metadata (creators, dates) visible in the middle or right panes, not just empty items with matching titles.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the actual Zotero application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots must show the Zotero desktop application window, not a text editor, web browser, or image editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected papers for the 'dataset-mnist' collection are 'Deep Learning' and 'Generative Adversarial Nets'. The expected papers for the 'dataset-imagenet' collection are 'ImageNet Classification with Deep Convolutional Neural Networks' and 'Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition'.
